free_text: Fast neutron elastic and inelastic scattering cross
sections for Ce-140 nuclei
#NSR 1989KO56
for 1 - 3 MeV
for 5 - 7 MeV
Neutron spread 60-100 KeV for energies 1-3 MeV
and 90-150 KeV for energies 5-7 MeV is mainly due to
target thickness and finite size of sample
Powder like sample 140CeO2 with mass 79.85 g, placed in
thin-walled brass cylindrical container with thickness
4.5cm and diameter 3.0cm, enriched to 140Ce up to 99.1%
Flight path 2.6 m
Electrostatic accelerator EG-5
Scintillation detector - stilbene with diameter
50 mm and thickness 50 mm
following corrections were made:
* on anisotropy in yield of neutrons from target,
* beam attenuation in sample,
* multiple scattering and angular discrimination.
Total uncertainty included all experimental
uncertainties:
* statistics of measurements and handling,
* uncertainty in normalization;
* uncertainties of used oxygen cross sections
UkrNDC
